note: responsive_menu stores all behaviour in the single config object `responsive_menu.settings` (no config entities, no plugin types, no permissions of its own). Easy cases probe load-bearing facts (config object, keys, blocks, route, library); medium reads a known live config back; hard builds a specific settings combination verified against live config.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site using the Responsive menu (4.4.x) module, which single config object stores all of the module's settings, and which key in it selects the Drupal menu that is rendered as the horizontal desktop menu?
evals.expected_output: Everything lives in the `responsive_menu.settings` config object; the `horizontal_menu` key holds the machine name of the menu rendered by the Horizontal menu block.

evals.prompt: Where do I configure the Responsive menu module in the Drupal admin UI, what is the route name of that settings form, and which permission does it require?
evals.expected_output: Admin -> Configuration -> User interface -> Responsive menu at /admin/config/user-interface/responsive-menu, route responsive_menu.settings, gated by the 'administer site configuration' permission.

evals.prompt: Responsive menu (4.4.x) renders nothing until you place its blocks. Which two block plugins does it provide, and what does each one do?
evals.expected_output: The `responsive_menu_toggle` block ('Responsive menu mobile icon', the burger toggle that opens the off-canvas panel) and the `responsive_menu_horizontal_menu` block ('Horizontal menu', the desktop-width menu shown past the breakpoint).

evals.prompt: In the Responsive menu module I want the off-canvas mobile panel to combine my 'main' and 'footer' menus into one. Which config key holds the off-canvas menu(s) and what format does it take for multiple menus?
evals.expected_output: The `off_canvas_menus` key in responsive_menu.settings; it is a comma-delimited list of menu machine names (e.g. `main,footer`) which are merged in order into a single off-canvas menu.

evals.prompt: On this live Drupal site the Responsive menu module is already configured. Inspect the running configuration and tell me: which Drupal menu is set as the horizontal (desktop) menu, which menu feeds the off-canvas mobile panel, which side does the off-canvas panel slide out from, and is the drag/swipe-to-open gesture enabled?
evals.expected_output: Reading responsive_menu.settings: horizontal_menu=admin, off_canvas_menus=footer, off_canvas_position=right, and drag is enabled (true). Breakpoint is Large / (min-width: 1000px), theme theme-white.

evals.prompt: On this live Drupal site, at what breakpoint (media query) does the Responsive menu module switch from the mobile off-canvas menu to the horizontal desktop menu, and which off-canvas mmenu theme (colour) is configured? Read the running configuration.
evals.expected_output: responsive_menu.settings has horizontal_breakpoint=Large with horizontal_media_query '(min-width: 1000px)', and off_canvas_theme=theme-white.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal 11 site the Responsive menu (4.4.x) module is installed. Configure it so that the site's 'main' menu is used as the horizontal desktop menu, the horizontal menu triggers at the 'Nav' theme breakpoint (the (min-width: 1200px) one), and the mobile drag/swipe-to-open gesture is enabled. Apply the change to the live site.

On this Drupal 11 site with Responsive menu (4.4.x) installed, set the horizontal desktop menu to the 'main' menu, make the off-canvas mobile menu trigger at the 'Nav' breakpoint (min-width 1200px), and turn on the swipe-to-open drag gesture for mobile users. Save the configuration so it is live.
